reason: All 3 immutable criteria MET, harness compliance clean, no unintended production change: immutable cmd -> 18 passed exit 0 (5 kill_switch + 4 currency + 5 screener + 4 learnings, all 4 gap areas); requires_live stays 11 (+0); ruff F821/F401/F811 clean; tests independently traced against real code and are non-rigged.
notes: CRITERION 1 MET: 4 new pure pytest files cover all four gap areas; immutable cmd -> '18 passed, 1125 deselected' exit 0. requires_live does NOT grow: grep on the 4 files = none; pytest -m requires_live --co = 11 (unchanged; 64.3 adds +0). The research's estimate of 6 is stale; the criterion is 'does not grow' and 64.3 contributes +0 -- disclosed honestly. Not a criterion miss. CRITERION 2 MET: stays-paused test pauses then check_auto_resume(nav=99000 healthy, enabled=False) asserts action=='no_op' + 'auto_resume_disabled' + is_paused() STILL True -- rail-5 (away-ops-rules.md:17-18), traced against kill_switch.py:362-363 no-mutation path; companion active-breach test (enabled=True, nav=90000) does NOT resume (kill_switch.py:379-385). Real, not rigged. CRITERION 3 MET: KR ON~70000(<500)/OFF<1000; EU(.DE) ON~150(<2)/OFF~162(>ON). Tests toggle the REAL flag paper_avg_entry_fx_fix_enabled (settings.py:455 default False) and exercise execute_buy's ON (paper_trader.py:332 LOCAL-share-weighted) vs OFF (:334 legacy USD/local mix) branch -- materially different ON/OFF values are dispositive proof the flag is load-bearing, NOT a tautology. EU is the NEW case. US byte-identical + fx-unavailable->None (paper_trader.py:231-233). Code fix is phase-70.3 (61.3 display-only); asserts 70.3 behavior in the SHAPE of 61.3 criteria -- consistent with 'mirrors 61.3 criteria'. ANTI-RIG: fx helpers call the PATCHED fx_rates.get_fx_rate; get_paper_trades_in_window (bigquery_client.py:949) has NO try/except so error propagates while empty->[]; market_for_symbol maps exactly; validate_ohlcv US fast-path returns SAME object + R1/R2/R3 logic traced. PURITY+NO-HARM: all pure (MagicMock bq, patched fx/ExecutionRouter, monkeypatched _AUDIT_PATH/_state, pandas; conftest PYFINAGENT_TEST_NO_BQ=1). git status = ONLY the 4 test files + handoff + hook audit JSONL; zero production code changed. _compute_learnings swallow left out-of-scope + FLAGGED; runtime autonomous-loop artifacts correctly attributed to the :8000 backend. No weakness found on independent adversarial review.
